narrative_summary: - User requested creation of a new Dagster project named `acme_co_dataeng`
- Read the `create-dagster.md` reference file to find the correct scaffolding command
- Ran `uvx create-dagster project acme_co_dataeng --uv-sync` which scaffolded the project and installed all dependencies (Dagster 1.12.18) into a virtual environment
- Provided next-step instructions for activating the venv and running the project
